name: Hidden Lands - Spot the differences
short_description: These lands are paused in time, split apart. Find their differences to to bring them back to life. Discover ancient civilizations through their lost treasures.
detailed_description:
Explore ancient floating worlds to find pieces of lost civilizations.
Hidden Lands is a procedurally generated Spot The Difference game with beautiful artstyle and endless levels.
Find the differences between 3d floating islands to restore their beauty and enjoy landscapes with a sublime marvelous design.
Observe carefully these nature simulations and solve all the quest to unlock objects and discover magical civilizations.

// Features
*Easy to use
*Infinite levels
*Comfortable Zoom and Rotation
*Share your favourite lands!
*Dynamic and relaxing music
